tasks.title: Redux architecture refactor
tasks.goal: Restructure Redux store to mirror the backend data model and simplify state management.
tasks.description: Refactor frontend Redux store into two primary slices: userSlice and placesSlice. Notes should remain embedded inside places instead of having a separate notes slice.
tasks.reason: Keeps Redux aligned with MongoDB data structure and prevents synchronization issues between notes and places.

tasks.title: MongoDB ID normalization
tasks.goal: Ensure all API responses return id instead of _id and remove __v.
tasks.description: Use Mongoose schema transforms to convert _id to id and remove internal MongoDB fields.
implementation: Use schema transform functions in placeSchema and userSchema
Normalize nested documents like owner and notes

tasks.title: Improve image upload handling
tasks.goal: Make file uploads safer and more scalable.
tasks.description: Enhance multer configuration to better support production environments.
tasks.reason: Image uploads are a common source of production bugs and storage issues.

tasks.title: JWT extraction middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware that extracts JWT from Authorization header, verifies it, and attaches the user to req.user.
benefits: improves security by centralizing auth checks

tasks.title: Global Express response helper
tasks.description: Add middleware that provides res.api() helper which automatically converts Mongoose documents to normalized JSON.
tasks.exampleMiddlewareConcept: If data has .toObject(), call it automatically. If array, normalize each item.

tasks.title: Backend API hardening
tasks.goal: Improve security and reliability for production deployment.

improvements.purpose: prevent brute-force attacks and API abuse
